title: The Keys to Robin’s Rescue: Rising Conflict

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Is the number 2 key here yet!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's my line!! You her- bivore!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We'll do rock, paper, scissors, sogging!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Cut one of our hands off.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Whoever is freed from the HandCuffs

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: I don't want to hear any more!!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Ready, Sogeking? Don't break your posture!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'll surely sue you one day!!!
